pred_reason: The VerifyETHAddress function allows arbitrary centralization of transfer permissions, fitting SWC-107. The randomItIs() function uses predictable block.timestamp and public state variables, matching SWC-101. Evidence: VerifyETHAddress enables owner to whitelist/blacklist any address arbitrarily; randomItIs() uses block.timestamp and public beans variable for blacklisting; Block timestamp and public state are miner/user-influencable inputs
